news.title: OpenAI升级ChatGPT with GPT-5.4 Thinking，提供六项关键改进
news.snippet: GPT-5.4 Thinking available for Plus, Team, and Pro subscribers and will replace GPT-5.2 Thinking, which is going away in three months.

news.title: 欧洲开始禁止AI生成儿童性虐待材料
news.snippet: Europe takes first step towards outlawing AI practices which generate child sexual abuse material after EU governments proposed to add this provision to the bloc's landmark AI rules.

tech.title: 2026年如何学习AI？完整路线图
tech.snippet: Unsure how to learn AI? Follow this roadmap for No-Code Power Users and Technical Builders. Future-proof your career with step-by-step guide.

tech.title: 2026年最佳5个LLM微调工具
tech.snippet: Mispredictions are easy to find, and misclassified samples can be labeled again and submitted in the next training batch. Labelbox provides model evaluation, RLHF, and RAG development.
